items.summaryOriginal: Hyundai Motor Group plans to buy SoftBank Group's ‌remaining 9.65% stake in Boston ‌Dynamics for $325 million to make the U.S. robotics ​firm a wholly owned subsidiary, South Korea's Maeil Business Newspaper reported on Friday. Hyundai Motor is expected to convene a ‌board meeting on ⁠June 22 to approve the purchase, the newspaper said, citing ⁠unnamed industry sources. The report said SoftBank had told Hyundai that it would ​like to ​exercise its rights ​to sell its ‌remaining stake in Boston Dynamics under a put option agreed when it sold Boston Dynamics to Hyundai.
